Added: head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex	Wed Sep 19 23:51:58 2012	(r304552)
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+# mkindex - Makes index of MIBS
+# $Id$
+FILE=mib_index.txt
+export LC_ALL=C
+
+echo "Creating $FILE"
+
+echo "MIB Index" > $FILE
+
+# refresh index files
+for d in `find -L . -mindepth 1 -type d -not -name CVS | grep -v .git | sort`; do
+    snmptranslate -M$d sysName > /dev/null 2>&1
+done
+
+# sort contents of index files
+for i in `find -L . -mindepth 1 -type f -name .index`; do
+    sort -dfs -o $i $i
+done
+
+# Add contents of each .index to our index
+for f in `find -L . -name .index | sort`; do
+    echo "" >> $FILE
+    echo $f >> $FILE
+    cat $f  >> $FILE
+    echo "" >> $FILE
+done
